note: Pure derivation of ordered wss:// space-probe candidates from a noas host. When neither the account nor noas discovery supplies a relay, a client probes these candidates under the ROOT DOMAIN of the noas server and adopts the first that is reachable. Only the derivation is vectored here — the reachability check (a WebSocket open) is I/O and client-specific. Root domain: strip scheme/port/path, lowercase, drop a trailing dot; when the host has 3+ labels drop the leftmost label. localhost, IPs, and hosts with no dot yield no candidates. Subdomains are lowercased, blanks skipped, duplicates collapsed.

candidates.name: flagship two-label host keeps its apex
three-label host drops its leftmost label to the root
the relay subdomain itself resolves back to its own root
url form with scheme, port, and path is reduced to the host
mixed case host normalizes to lowercase
blank subdomains are skipped and duplicates collapse
empty subdomain list yields no candidates
